info.title: Important, Please Read!
info.desc: You are about to create a Quantum Coin wallet. Do not send Ethereum or other coins or tokens to this wallet address!

info.title: Passwords
info.desc: Make sure that you use a strong, long password and do not forget it!

info.title: Backups
info.desc: Backup your wallet and keep it safe offline. Keep at least three copies of your wallets in different places offline.

info.title: Wallet Safety
info.desc: Do not share your wallet or passwords with anyone. Scammers often offer to help but will steal your wallet!

info.title: Email Safety
info.desc: Do not reply to or open attachments, links or images in emails that talks about Quantum Coin, tokens or wallets. They are most likely scams that can result in your coins and tokens getting stolen!

info.title: Social Media and Messaging Apps Safety
info.desc: Do not respond to social media and messaging app direct-messages from anyone in general talking about Quantum Coin. They are most likely scammers who can trick you and steal your coins or tokens!

quizWrongAnswer: Your answer is wrong! Please read the question carefully and try again.

quiz.title: Coin Type
quiz.question: What coins or tokens can you send to this wallet?
quiz.afterQuizInfo: This is correct. You should be send only Quantum Coins to this wallet.

quiz.title: Lost wallet or password
quiz.question: If you lost your wallet or password, who can help recover?
quiz.afterQuizInfo: This is correct. No one can help you recover your wallet or password.

langValues.title: QuantumSwap
langValues.use-strong-password: Use a strong and long password. And do not forget it!
langValues.restore-wallet-from-seed: Restore A Quantum Wallet From Seed Words
langValues.seed-words-info-1: 1. Ensure that no one is looking at the screen other than you.
langValues.seed-words-info-2: 2. Ensure that there is no camera pointed at this screen, including from your phone.
langValues.seed-words-info-3: 3. You should save the seed words safely offline and keep multiple copies in a trustworthy and safe location.
langValues.seed-words-info-4: 4. If these seed words are stolen or someone else gets access to them, your wallet is compromised.
langValues.seed-words-show: 5. Click here to reveal the seed words.
langValues.waitWalletSave: Please wait while your wallet is being saved with strong encryption. This can take upto a minute or so to complete...
langValues.waitWalletOpen: Please wait while your wallet is being decrypted and opened. This can take upto a minute...
langValues.waitUnlock: Please wait while your wallet is being decrypted and unlocked. This can take upto a minute.
langValues.name: Name
langValues.send-only: Send only Quantum coins to this address!
langValues.no-more-transactions: There are no more transactions to show.
langValues.select-seed-word-length: How many seed words do you have?
langValues.skip-verify-confirm: Are you sure you want to skip verification? It is recommended that you verify.
langValues.advanced-signing-description: Applicable wallets will incur 30 times higher gas price if this setting is enabled
langValues.backup-prompt: Do you want to allow wallets to be backed up as part of phone backups?
langValues.backup-description: When enabled, encrypted wallet data will be included in phone backups and device transfers. Unless your phone actually is backed up, this setting will have no effect.
langValues.backup-submitted-cloud-message: Your wallet has been written to [FOLDER]/[FILENAME] and submitted for cloud upload. Cloud uploads finish in the background and may take time depending on your network. The backup is NOT yet fully durable in the cloud — keep this device powered on and connected until the upload completes. You can check upload status in your cloud provider's app.
langValues.restore-decrypt-failed: Unable to decrypt. Enter a different password or skip this file.
langValues.restore-no-backups-found: No backup files were found in the selected folder.
langValues.restore-try-different-password: Unable to decrypt any wallet with that password. Try with a different password.
langValues.restore-strongbox-write-failed: The backup file decrypted successfully, but it could not be saved to your device's wallet store. The wallet password you entered earlier does not match the password protecting this device. Cancel and start the restore again, then enter the device wallet password when asked.
langValues.restore-partial-progress: [COUNT] wallet(s) were restored. Enter password for the remaining.
langValues.restore-wallets-decrypting: Please wait while your wallet(s) are being decrypted and restored; this can take many minutes.
langValues.camera-permission-denied: Camera access has been blocked. Open Settings and grant the Camera permission to scan QR codes.
langValues.cloud-backup-info: You will be able to see cloud options only if configured in the phone
langValues.backup-options-description: Save an encrypted backup now. You can save to cloud and to a file (you can do both, one after the other). Tap Done when you're finished.
langValues.wallet-already-exists-detailed:
The wallet with following address already exists:
[ADDRESS]
langValues.review-transaction-prompt: Please review your transaction request to be sent:
langValues.must-agree-to-submit: You have to agree to submit the transaction.
langValues.confirm-wallet-description: Check your wallet address. If this is not the correct address, you may press back to review and edit the seed words.
langValues.address-checksum-warning: This address does not match its expected checksum form. Double-check that the address is correct before sending.
langValues.backup-encrypted-warning: Important: choosing "No" excludes the wallet file from Android Auto Backup, but full device backups (e.g. Smart Switch, device-to-device transfer, or some vendor cloud backups) may still include all app data. The wallet file remains encrypted with your password regardless of this setting.
langValues.no-active-network: There is no active network. Add and select a network from Settings.
langValues.seed-accessibility-summary: Seed phrase is displayed on screen. Use the Copy button to copy it.
langValues.seed-hidden-for-capture: Seed phrase hidden because the screen is being recorded or mirrored. Stop screen recording or mirroring to view the seed.
langValues.strongbox-degraded-banner: Wallet integrity check recovered from a backup slot. Please create a fresh backup soon.
langValues.submitting-transaction: Please wait while your transaction is being submitted.
langValues.tamper-debugger-message: A debugger is attached to this app. We strongly recommend you exit. If you understand the risk, you can ignore this warning and continue.
langValues.tamper-jailbreak-message: This device shows signs of being rooted. The OS-level isolation that protects your wallet is bypassed - apps you trust can be modified by other apps you have installed. Continue at your own risk, or quit?
langValues.tamper-runtime-message: This wallet's signing module has been modified. We strongly recommend you exit and reinstall from the Play Store. If you understand the risk, you can ignore this warning and continue.
langValues.transaction-message-exits: A transaction request is already in progress.
langValues.transaction-sent: Your transaction request has been sent.
langValues.swapEarlyPhaseWarn: This is a feature still in early phases of testing. Do you want to continue?
langValues.token-picker-search-placeholder: Search name / symbol or paste contract address
langValues.swap-no-pair: No swap route exists between these two tokens (no direct pair and no route through intermediate tokens, max 3 hops)
langValues.swap-gas-high-warning: Gas limit is high. Consider reviewing before proceeding.
langValues.swap-approval-confirm-message: You are approving [QUANTITY] tokens for use in QuantumSwap.
langValues.swap-approval-may-close: You may close this dialog, the transaction for approval has already been submitted.
langValues.swap-approval-completed: Token approval completed. You can continue with Swap.
langValues.swap-approval-status-minute: This can take up to a minute...
langValues.swap-execute-confirm-message: You are swapping [FROM_AMOUNT] [FROM_SYMBOL] for at least [TO_AMOUNT] [TO_SYMBOL].
langValues.first-provider-warn: This pool is empty. You are the first liquidity provider: the ratio of the amounts you add sets the initial price of this pair.
langValues.amounts-invalid: Enter valid amounts for both sides.
langValues.tx-step-please-wait: Please wait, this can take up to a minute...
langValues.tx-step-invalid-gas: Enter a valid positive gas limit.
langValues.tx-step-timeout: Timed out waiting for the transaction to confirm. Check the block explorer before retrying.
langValues.addReleaseWarn: Adding a compromised or scam release can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens. All swaps will run against its contracts. Are you sure you want to continue?!
langValues.releaseAdded: The release has been added. Remember that swapping through a compromised or scam release can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens.!
langValues.useReleaseWarn: This is a custom release. All swaps will run against its contracts. A compromised or scam release can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens. Do you want to continue?

errors.passwordSpec: Enter a minimum of 12 characters for password
errors.passwordSpace: Password cannot start or end with spaces
errors.walletPasswordMismatch: The password does not match what you entered earlier.
errors.enterAmount: Please enter the amount to send correctly.
errors.seed-word-empty: Please enter the seed word in [LABEL].
errors.seed-word-invalid: The word in [LABEL] is not a valid seed word.
errors.seed-word-mismatch: The word in [LABEL] does not match the original seed word.
errors.unlock-too-many-attempts-seconds: Too many failed attempts. Please wait [SECONDS] seconds and try again.
errors.unlock-too-many-attempts-one-minute: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 1 minute and try again.
errors.unlock-too-many-attempts-minutes: Too many failed attempts. Please wait [MINUTES] minutes and try again.
errors.network-rpc-invalid-host: RPC Endpoint URL is not a valid https host.
errors.network-scan-invalid-host: Scan API domain is not a valid hostname.
errors.network-explorer-invalid-host: Block explorer domain is not a valid hostname.
errors.network-id-positive-integer: Network ID must be a positive integer.
errors.network-secure-storage-unavailable: Secure storage is unavailable; cannot save network.
errors.reveal-wallet-error-generic: Unable to reveal the wallet. Please check your password and try again.
errors.invalidRelease: The release could not be added. Check the name (max 60 plain-text characters) and that each contract address is 0x followed by 64 hex characters.
errors.releasePasswordWrong: The wallet password you entered is incorrect.
errors.gasEstimateError: Could not fetch the gas fee from the network. Using the default estimate.
